segments.text: O God, my heart is steadfast; I will sing and give praise, even with my glory.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: Awake, lute and harp! I will awaken the dawn.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: I will praise You, O Lord, among the peoples, And I will sing praises to You among the nations.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: For Your mercy is great above the heavens, And Your truth reaches to the clouds.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: Be exalted, O God, above the heavens, And Your glory above all the earth;
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: That Your beloved may be delivered, Save with Your right hand, and hear me.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: God has spoken in His holiness:
I will rejoice; I will divide Shechem And measure out the Valley of Succoth.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Gilead is Mine; Manasseh is Mine; Ephraim also is the helmet for My head; Judah is My lawgiver.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Moab is My washpot; Over Edom I will cast My shoe; Over Philistia I will triumph.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Who will bring me into the strong city? Who will lead me to Edom?
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: Is it not You, O God, who cast us off? And You, O God, who did not go out with our armies?
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: Give us help from trouble, For the help of man is useless.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: Through God we will do valiantly, For it is He who shall tread down our enemies.
segments.speaker: David
